creator: root@cooltrainer.org
text:
Subsonic 5.3 is the last version licensed GPLv3. As of 6.0 it is proprietary. Your port still incorrectly lists LICENSE=GPLv3 for 6.0

Sources:

http://forum.subsonic.org/forum/viewtopic.php?f=4&t=16604#p71128

https://github.com/sindremehus/subsonic/issues/1 (Repo is for 5.3)
